title: astracantha xanthogossypina
intro: Astracantha xanthogossypina, also known as yellow-spine broom grass, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astracantha xanthogossypina include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its roots or leaves, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts.
